channel.title: Hi-Lo Liquor Market — Costa Mesa Events
channel.description: Upcoming tastings, pop-ups, and events at Hi-Lo Liquor Market (Costa Mesa).

item.title: Free Tasting: Calista Coffee
item.description:
When: Nov 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a complimentary tasting of Calista Coffee!

item.title: Free Tasting: Sweet Gwendoline French Gin
item.description:
When: Nov 12 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Sweet Gwendoline is a gin sourced in the South of France and infused with wine and Figue de Solliès, a variety of fig grown in the region. Come by and try this French gin an experience its sweet entry, juniper, green apple, pepper notes and unique round citrus finish.

item.title: Free Tasting: ROM Beer Co
item.description:
When: Nov 7 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Rom Beer Co.

item.title: Free Tasting: Angel's Envy
item.description:
When: Nov 4 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Based in the heart of Louisville, Angel's Envy produces Kentucky Straight Bourbon Finished in Port Barrels. Angel's Envy started as a father & son project and has now evolved into a project in which 3 generations of Hendersons are all working together. Come on in and try Angel's Envy small-batch, hand crafted whiskies!

item.title: Free Tasting: Ranch West Organic Beer
item.description:
When: Nov 2 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come sample Ranch West Organic Beer! Their a mission to shift the cultural change towards a beer that’s better for you and for the planet.

item.title: Boo Bash
item.description:
When: Oct 30 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for some Halloween Festivities at the Camp! We'll have complimentary tastings and Donuts by Dane's Donuts!

item.title: Free Tasting: Xila Aperitif + Coastal Stone + Bimini Gin
item.description:
When: Oct 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Enjoy this complimentary tasting around the world spirits!

item.title: Free Tasting: Copalli Rum
item.description:
When: Oct 29 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Copalli's organic rums are crafted in Southern Belize at the Copal Tree Distillery, designed to run on biomass to have as low a carbon footprint as possible. Crafted from organic fresh sugar cane and proofed with "canopy water" collected straight from the rainforest, the Copal Tree Distillery supports sustainable agriculture, producing and selling premium organic, gluten-free spirits. Stop by and taste these delicious terroir driven spirits!

item.title: Free Tasting: Smog City
item.description:
When: Oct 28 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come by and try some incredible beers from the award-winning LA craft brewery, Smog City, owned and run by husband and wife duo Jonathan and Laurie Porter.

item.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
item.description:
When: Oct 26 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us at our Costa Mesa location for a free tasting of Morro Mezcal.

item.title: Free Tasting: Ola Sol
item.description:
When: Oct 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

item.title: Free Tasting: Yuzy Margaritas
item.description:
When: Oct 23 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Yuzy margaritas!

item.title: Hi-Lo Costa Mesa: Mini Market
item.description:
When: Oct 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us at our Costa Mesa location for our fall Mini Market! We'll have complimentary tastings with Lovely Bunch, Taste Buds, Dead of Night Distillery, Pfeiffers Famous Beer, Nosotros Tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Calirosa Tequila
item.description:
When: Oct 20 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Calirosa has taken a spin on traditional tequila – a fusion of Mexican spirit and California style captured in their Rosa Blanco, Anejo and Extra Anejo. Come by and try their 100% agave tequilas aged in California red wine barrels.

item.title: Costa Mesa Fall Market
item.description:
When: Oct 18 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a festive day of local vendors + tattoos + free tastings + coffee + Basque cheesecake!!

item.title: Free Tasting: Chapman Crafted Beer
item.description:
When: Oct 16 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a freet tasting with Chapman Crafted Beer!

item.title: Free Tasting: NEFT Vodka
item.description:
When: Oct 13 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Crafted in Austria, NEFT Vodka is made from just two ingredients – Old World, non-GMO rye and oxygen-rich mountain spring water sourced from the Rhein River beneath the Alps. NEFT combines four different types of non-GMO ancient rye grains, is distilled three times in a copper-pot still using carbon-layer filtering, and is packaged in an eye catching unbreakable barrel. Come on in and try this great-tasting, smooth, quality rye vodka that is worth sipping.

item.title: Free Tasting: YOLA Mezcal
item.description:
When: Oct 6 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Female founded and run, this brand was created to honor Yola's grandfather and the centuries old know-how he bestowed on his children and grandchildren in the art of mezcal. Made from a blend of organic, fully ripe espadin and madrecuixe agaves that are naturally processed and double distilled in direct fire copper pot stills. The team behind Yola is dedicated to sustainability in all their efforts around mezcal and the greater community it impacts. Come on in and try this handcrafted, organic, artisanal mezcal!

item.title: Sunday Market is back! Join us this Saturday for a fun filled day with local vendors, complimentary tastings, food and music!
item.description:
When: Sep 28 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Sunday Market is back! Join us this Saturday for a fun filled day with local vendors, complimentary tastings, food and music!

item.title: Free Tasting: NON Na Wines
item.description:
When: Sep 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Non is a NA wine alternative that will spark your tastebuds. Each bottle has key notes of floral, tannin, salinity, acidity.

item.title: Free Tasting: NEFT Vodka
item.description:
When: Sep 22 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Crafted in Austria, NEFT Vodka is made from just two ingredients – Old World, non-GMO rye and oxygen-rich mountain spring water sourced from the Rhein River beneath the Alps. NEFT combines four different types of non-GMO ancient rye grains, is distilled three times in a copper-pot still using carbon-layer filtering, and is packaged in an eye catching unbreakable barrel. Come on in and try this great-tasting, smooth, quality rye vodka that is worth sipping.

item.title: Free Tasting: Zaddy's RTD Cocktails
item.description:
When: Sep 15 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Made for both gin lovers and non-gin lovers, Zaddy's RTD canned cocktails are low sugar, low ABV, gluten free, and super refreshing. Come on in and try Zaddy's creative, unique craft cocktails that are perfect all year round.

item.title: Free Tasting: Nova Brewing
item.description:
When: Sep 12 4:00 PM - 7:30 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Nova Brewing!

item.title: Free Tasting: Soonish
item.description:
When: Sep 9 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Slightly tart and subtly sweet, Soonish Natural Beer is gluten-free, lightly carbonated, low calorie and low in sugar. Made from simple, wholesome ingredients (banana, ancient grains and honey), Soonish is a lighter, brighter brew for any and all occasions. Come through and try what this natural beer is all about!

item.title: Free Tasting: Tip Top
item.description:
When: Aug 31 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Tip Top canned cocktails!

item.title: Jumbo Time Wines x Hi-Lo Wine Collab Release Party
item.description:
When: Aug 29 4:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Where: Costa Mesa

We're so excited to announce we've collaborated with one of our favorite wine producers Jumbo Time Wines to bring you an amazing orange and chillable red! We’ll be partying at ALL three locations pouring these delicious wines along with food vendors: Long Beach ~ Rize Kitchen and Tip Top Canned Cocktails Culver City ~ Lindfors Farms Pizza and Livewire Cocktails Costa Mesa ~ Dane's Donuts

item.title: Free Tasting: Wilde Irish Gin
item.description:
When: Aug 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Wilde Irish Gin is distilled in Ireland using select Irish ingredients. It is an exquisite blend of carefully selected ingredients that shine through in every sip. This premium gin is distilled by hand in small batches with two copper pot stills to ensure a level of quality that can only result from a master distiller's intuition. Come by and taste this standout gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: Simple Shots
item.description:
When: Aug 23 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come sample the spirit based juice shot. Simple ingredients, all natural, made with real fruit.

item.title: Free Tasting: Wolves Whiskey
item.description:
When: Aug 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Wolves Whiskey! California's first luxury whiskey brand.

item.title: Food Pop: Dane's Donuts
item.description:
When: Aug 3 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Dane's Donuts will be selling donuts out front while we have free tastings from Golden Eagle Vodka and Rancho West Beer.

item.title: Free Tasting: Unico Zelo
item.description:
When: Aug 2 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Unico Zelo wines!

item.title: Free Tasting Orin Swift
item.description:
When: Jul 31 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

We'll be tasting through some of the classics from Orin Swift!

item.title: Pop-Up: "Sunday Market"
item.description:
When: Jul 13 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Summer is hitting hard with our next pop up at Hi-Lo Costa Mesa inside The Camp 🥂 Catch us on July 13, from 2pm-6pm!! We’re celebrating big for Hi-Lo Liquor Market’s 2 year anniversary! — vendors, food, free tastings, music, & a good time 🍷✨ Free tastings with: • Golden Eagle Vodka • Black Lamb Wines • Siesta Tinned fish • Leisure Hydration • South Forty • Morning Recovery • Dead of Night • Off Hours • Slow Days Gin Co

item.title: Free Tasting: Mijenta Tequila
item.description:
When: Jul 3 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Mijenta Tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Fallen Grape
item.description:
When: Jun 20 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Fallen Grape Wine Co. We'll be sampling the chilled red and orange wine.

item.title: Free Tasting: Burgeon Beer Co
item.description:
When: Jun 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Burgeon Beer Co!

item.title: Free Tasting: Catedral Mezcal
item.description:
When: Jun 18 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Catedral Mezcal!

item.title: Free Tasting: Tasting-Lodestar Whiskey
item.description:
When: Jun 15 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Celebrating Women's History Month, meet the founders of this women-owned American Whiskey brand!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bücha Hard Kombucha
item.description:
When: May 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a complimentary tasting with Bücha! A small batch kombucha made in San Diego from 100% organic whole fruit sourced from small California farms.

item.title: Spring Market at Costa Mesa
item.description:
When: May 16 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a fun day with a ton of vendors! Vivy Cocktails / Wilbur Wine Spritzers / Soto Sake / Calista Coffee / Neft Vodka

item.title: Free Tasting: Golden Eagle Vodka
item.description:
When: May 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Golden Eagle Vodka!

item.title: Free Tasting: Off Hours Bourbon
item.description:
When: May 14 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Off Hours Bourbon!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bandero Tequila
item.description:
When: May 8 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Bandero Tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Cateral Mezcal
item.description:
When: May 4 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Founded by a father-daughter duo to reinvent the mezcal market in the US by elevating the men (and women) behind the bottle and paying homage to mezcal’s essential role in Mexican culture.

item.title: Free Tasting: Angelisco Tequila
item.description:
When: May 3 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Angelisco Tequila is produced in the Highlands of Jalisco, Mexico, from blue weber agave grown in the mineral rich, deep red clay soil within the Golden Triangle of the Los Altos region. Come taste their Blanco and Reposado Tequilas!

item.title: Free Tasting: Madre Mezcal & Tequila
item.description:
When: May 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Madre is an artisanal mezcal, made by hand in the rolling hills of the Oaxacan Sierra. Come by and try their Ensamble, Espadín, and tequila!

item.title: Free Tasting: Banhez Mezcal, Libelula Tequila & Combier Liqueur
item.description:
When: Apr 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

In the lead up to Cinco de Mayo, come sample three amazing products that will elevate your celebrations…plus free cocktail cards and Libelula cocktail shakers will be handed out.

item.title: Hi-Lo x Prism Boutique Spring Market
item.description:
When: Apr 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

We’re excited to have our dear friends from Prism Boutique join us in Costa Mesa t💐April 27th ~ 4-7PM! Don’t miss a lovely evening filled with craft goods, complimentary tastings and delicious Vegan Banh Mi’s!

item.title: Free Tasting: Cazcanes Tequila – POSTPONED
item.description:
When: Apr 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Unfortunately this free tasting is postponed for a later date. Keep an eye out and join us for a free tasting with Cazcanes Tequila, an award-winning, organic, additive free tequila when they're back.

item.title: Free Tasting: Sake High
item.description:
When: Apr 19 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

A female owned sake born out of a love and passion for a good drink! Sake High is brewed in Kyoto, Japan and is all-natural, gluten free and sulfite free.

item.title: Free Tasting: Mariscos & Martinis
item.description:
When: Apr 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come by and try some delicious Mariscos including oysters & seafood bites and pair them with mini Martini samples made with Las Californias gins!

item.title: Free Tasting: Redthumb Wines
item.description:
When: Apr 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Redthumb Wines focuses on organic, natural, and clean wines and are transparent about it! Come by and try their Chardonnay and Tempranillo!

item.title: Free Tasting: Song Cai Viet Nam Gin
item.description:
When: Apr 7 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Song Cai is a first of its kind Vietnamese distillery bottling the taste and flavors of Viet Nam's biodiverse terroir through gins and other spirits. Come by and try their unique gins!

item.title: Free Tasting: BTL SVC
item.description:
When: Apr 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

BTL SVC provides award-winning, hand-crafted, premium cocktails, conveniently served anytime and anywhere.

item.title: Free Tasting: Copalli Rum
item.description:
When: Mar 30 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Copalli's organic rums are crafted in Southern Belize at the Copal Tree Distillery, designed to run on biomass to have as low a carbon footprint as possible. Crafted from organic fresh sugar cane and proofed with "canopy water" collected straight from the rainforest, the Copal Tree Distillery supports sustainable agriculture, producing and selling premium organic, gluten-free spirits. Stop by and taste these delicious terroir driven spirits!

item.title: Free Tasting: Zaddy's RTD Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 28 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Made for both gin lovers and non-gin lovers, Zaddy's RTD canned cocktails are low sugar, low ABV, gluten free, and super refreshing. Come on in and try Zaddy's creative, unique craft cocktails that are perfect all year round.

item.title: Free Tasting: Salt Point Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 27 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Salt Point has been crafting premium canned cocktails with all-natural ingredients along the coast of Northern California since 2013. Right here to be exact: 38.0834° N, 122.7633° W. Everyone at Salt Point is committed to quality ingredients and the finest of spirits. Though things can get a little foggy around there, they're clear about this: less is more. That’s why they keep the ingredients to a minimum and prefer to sail by the stars. So whether you’re hanging with old friends or interesting strangers, Salt Point invites you to kick back and raise a can. Come on in and give Salt Point a try with this free tasting of their premium canned drinks!

item.title: Free Tasting: Amarok Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 24 12:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Amarok Brewing, LA's smallest brewery, specializes in IPas with unique hops and ingredients from around the world. Come by, meet owner and brewer Anthony, and try his delicious 'South African Hazy,' a DDH Hazy DIPA and 'Science Fair DIPA', an experimental hop West Coast DIPA.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tequila Mandala
item.description:
When: Mar 23 4:00 PM - 7:00 AM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come try the balanced and refined flavor of each Mandala tequila, all are hand made and beautifully hand painted to create a beautiful and unique piece of art.

item.title: Free Tasting: Brouwerij West
item.description:
When: Mar 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Brouwerij West out of San Pedro, California will be in store to sample some of their delicious American and Belgian-inspired beers!

item.title: Free Tasting: Yebiga Rakija
item.description:
When: Mar 21 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Yebiga Rakija! Yebiga Rakija is an exceptional, handcrafted, and 100% natural Sljivovica, a fruit brandy from Central Serbia.

item.title: Free Tasting: Vacation Cocktails Hot Tropic RTD
item.description:
When: Mar 18 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Come by and try the newly launched Vacation Cocktails – ready-to-drink canned cocktails with real spirits and natural flavors. Made right here in Costa Mesa!

item.title: Free Tasting: Calidad Beer and Hard Seltzer
item.description:
When: Mar 15 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Calidad produces some wonderfully made beers that homage Mexican lagers and they also have a hard seltzer line that are a delightful play on Agua Frescas!

item.title: Free Tasting: Los Sundays Tequila
item.description:
When: Mar 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Los Sunday's tequila.

item.title: Free Tasting: Sake High
item.description:
When: Mar 11 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Sake High! is premium junmai sake brewed in Kyoto, Japan using classic techniques and local ingredients. Come by and try the refreshing sake, which comes in single cans and bottles.

item.title: Free Tasting: Stereo Brewing
item.description:
When: Mar 10 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Stereo is an independent brewery making remixes of classic styles. Come by and try their beers which range from the hop forward, to classic styles reimagined, to a crisp light delight.

item.title: Free Tasting: Bimini Gin + Death & Co Moonsail Fizz
item.description:
When: Mar 2 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Bimini Gin is the modern gin. It's handcrafted using a few familiar key botanicals— grapefruit zest, hops, coriander seed—that taste bright and citrusy with a beautiful floral aroma. Come by and try Bimini and Death & Co's Moonsail Fizz RTD, which features Bimini Gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: LiveWire Canned Cocktails
item.description:
When: Mar 1 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

LiveWire creates award-winning cocktails made by award-winning bartenders. The company's mission is to help further highlight the immensely talented bartenders that create brilliant drinks & nights, around the world. LiveWire bartender-collaborators design unique cocktails, using the finest spirits in the world, natural flavors and extracts, and choose the artists that design the art on the packaging to help their vision come alive. Come try these exciting ready-to-drink canned cocktails and support the bartender community.

item.title: Free Tasting: There Does Not Exist
item.description:
When: Feb 26 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

There Does Not Exist Brewing from San Luis Obispo, will be tasting out some of their gorgeous beers.

item.title: Free Tasting: Madre Mezcal & Desert Water
item.description:
When: Feb 25 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Madre is an artisanal mezcal, made by hand in the rolling hills of the Oaxacan Sierra. Come by and try their Ensamble, Espadín, and Desert Water, an RTD made only with artisanal mezcal, sparkling water, and real adaptogens, herbs & fruits.

item.title: Food Pop-Up: Eat Your Wave Burger
item.description:
When: Feb 4 12:00 PM - 3:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

One of our favorite Long Beach food pop-ups, Eat Your Wave Burger, is coming to Costa Mesa! Eat Your Wave Burger is the delicious brainchild of Daria and Alex who moved to SoCal not so long ago with a dream to establish the best burger restaurant. Back in their country, they had a famous burger joint and decided that it was time to show their unique approach to the world. And isn't a smash burger the best place to start? Come join us this Saturday for some burgers and fun!

item.title: Free Tasting: Vala Lifestyle Seltzer
item.description:
When: Jan 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting Vala Seltzer, they're a low abv lifestyle seltzer that's low cal and sugar-free. We'll be sampling Cucumber mint and Yuzu Lemon.

item.title: Free Tasting: Tost
item.description:
When: Jan 24 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Tost, an NA tea based drink.

item.title: Free Tasting: Dry January Delight with Rancho West, Aplos, Ghia, Odd Bird, Saint Viviana & Chandon House
item.description:
When: Jan 10 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

No reason to stay thirsty this January. Celebrate Dry January with the best NA goods in the game from Rancho West Organic Beers, Ghia, Aplós Spirits, Saint Viviana Wines, Odd Bird Wines…and special fun products from Chandon House. Now's the time to discovery how tasty this month can be!!!

item.title: Free Tasting: Hoplark N/A Beer
item.description:
When: Jan 4 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Hoplark is non-alcoholic craft brews, teas and waters hopped and crafted like beer. All of the hoppy flavor without the calories, sugar or alcohol. Stop on in and try their N/A beers!

item.title: Store Closed – MERRY CHRISTMAS!
item.description:
When: Dec 25 12:00 AM - 11:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

We'll be closed for Christmas Day but open again on December 26th at our normal hours. Enjoy your holiday!

item.title: Free Tasting: Mezcal 33 – POSTPONED
item.description:
When: Dec 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us to taste Mezcal 33 and discover the magic of what this master number represents, reflected through the perfection and passion we pour into every drop of their mezcals.

item.title: Free Tasting: Green River Whiskey
item.description:
When: Dec 19 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Green River Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Morro Mezcal
item.description:
When: Dec 17 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Morro Mezcal crafts their small batch artisanal spirits using time-honored methods and traditions of mezcal production, using mature single origin agaves, an earthen hardwood-fueled oven, open air wooden fermentation vessels and small wood-fired copper still distillation. Their mezcals are distilled to proof using agaves grown in the mountains of El Gramal in Oaxaca giving depth, character and complexity.

item.title: Free Tasting: Ciao Pappy
item.description:
When: Dec 16 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Ciao Pappy is a local company that uses amazing, fresh ingredients for the their tomato sauces. Come by and try their delicious sauces, which are perfect for pasta, pizza, meatballs, and more!

item.title: Sip n' Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 14 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us at all three locations to Sip & Shop on 12/14 | 2-6PM 🎁 We’ve got a festive day filled with complimentary tastings, local vendors, gift with purchase, gift wrapping and more!!

item.title: Free Tasting: Cara a Cara Mezcal
item.description:
When: Dec 13 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Cara a Cara Mezcal!

item.title: Off Hours Whiskey Takeover
item.description:
When: Dec 13 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a festive day of Off Hours whiskey at all locations with a curated experience, including: a complimentary festive drink and gifts with purchase. • Culver City: SMPL Artisan Cheesecakes will be popping-up with yummy, fresh cheesecakes • Long Beach: Slowlines Art will be popping-up • Costa Mesa: Made by Mabel Ceramics will be popping-up

item.title: Free Tasting: Ogopogo Brewing
item.description:
When: Dec 12 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Sean from Ogopogo Brewing in San Gabriel, California will be in store sampling beers! The beers are named for legendary creatures and figures from around the world, with the style of beer and ingredients used often linked through the country of origin.

item.title: Free Tasting: Straightaway Cocktails
item.description:
When: Dec 11 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Made in Portland, OR, Straightaway cocktails are meticulously crafted using only real juice and the highest quality ingredients. Stop by and try these award-winning RTD cocktails – which make for perfect stocking stuffers and gifts for your cocktail-loving friends and family!

item.title: Sip & Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 10 12:00 PM - 5:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us this Saturday at all three Hi-Lo locations! Shop small and get festive with us. Complimentary gift wrapping & libations!

item.title: Hi-Lo Sip n' Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 9 4:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Save the date!!!! December 9th all 3 shops will be hosting a Sip n’ Shop! We’ll have tons of brands sampling out their products for you to try! Come shop presents for your friends and family, sip on tasty bevs, and eat some delicious food!

item.title: Free Tasting: CNS Imports Tasting
item.description:
When: Dec 6 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting CNS Imports, we'll be tasting through some Japanese whiskeys!

item.title: Holiday Sip & Shop
item.description:
When: Dec 6 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a festive day at all Locations 2-6PM. We've got complimentary tastings and local vendors lined up for a festive day of shopping! We're here to make gift giving season extra special!

item.title: Hi-Lo Pop Up at Smorgasburg LA
item.description:
When: Dec 4 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Smorgasburg LA has officially kicked off their Sunday Holiday Market for the season. Stop by the Hi-Lo booth this Sunday, Dec 4th! Located at ROW DTLA on 777 Alameda St.

item.title: Free Tasting: Lost Irish Whiskey
item.description:
When: Dec 2 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Lost Irish is an Irish Whiskey made from casks collected from six continents. Their triple distilled spirit combines all three styles of Irish Whiskey which balances flavor and complexity – the grain lends sweetness, the malt adds fruitiness, and the pot still contributes spice and cream. Stop by and try this smooth and delicious Irish Whiskey!

item.title: Free Tasting: Bardstown Whiskey
item.description:
When: Nov 29 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

item.title: Small Business Saturday!
item.description:
When: Nov 26 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

In celebration of Small Business Saturday, we are giving away free Hi-Lo Bandana with purchase! Come by and support the products we carry from local businesses and producers!

item.title: Free Tasting: Trip N/A Drinks
item.description:
When: Nov 22 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

item.title: Free Tasting: El Segundo
item.description:
When: Nov 20 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Formed in 2011, El Segundo is an independent craft brewery focusing on fresh, hoppy West Coast IPAs and other crisp flavors.

item.title: Free Tasting: Rally Gin
item.description:
When: Nov 19 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Rally Gin is a California black and woman owned spirit company. Rally Gin is handcrafted and micro-distilled in small batches and is produced using 12 premium botanicals and Italian spices. Their distilling kettle is vapor-infused, giving a precise gin flavor profile. Come by and experience the difference in Rally Gin!

item.title: Free Tasting: Empirical Spirits
item.description:
When: Nov 17 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Stop by and try spirits and RTDs from Empirical Spirits, a flavor-first company that takes the highest-quality ingredients and turns them into delicious experiences.

item.title: Free Tasting: Silvergrin Vodka & Warbringer Bourbon
item.description:
When: Nov 17 3:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Where: Costa Mesa

Join us for a free tasting with Silvergrin Vodka & Warbringer Bourbon!
